name: reference-signal-forms
tagline: Explains the mental model of Angular's experimental signal-based Forms API for agents editing packages/forms/signals.
verdict: Safe, coherent architecture reference with a worked usage example and an on-demand references/integration.md for deeper detail. Missing negative-trigger guidance and no version/changelog signal are the only gaps found.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion text anywhere, despite a sibling skill covering the adjacent packages/core directory it could be confused with.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
